charging_inactive.reason: Stop active battery charging before changing this setting.

ac_charging_allowed.reason: AC charging is currently disabled by Charge Source Priority.

utility_charging_allowed.reason: Utility charging is currently disabled by Charge Source Priority.

pv_only_charging.reason: Charge Source Priority is not currently set to PV Only.

off_grid_mode.reason: This recommendation is intended for Off-Grid operation.

fault_mode.reason: This action is only available while the inverter is in Fault mode.

safe_configuration_mode.reason: This setting can only be changed while the inverter is in Power On, Standby, or Fault mode.

remote_control_enabled.reason: Remote control is disabled by the current Turn On Mode setting.

pv_available.reason: PV input is not currently available.

groups.title: Output
groups.description: Output priority and nominal output parameters.

groups.title: Charging
groups.description: Charging source priority and current limits.

groups.title: Battery
groups.description: Battery voltage thresholds and battery behavior.

groups.title: System
groups.description: General inverter operating modes, restart behavior, and front-panel options.

capabilities.title: Output Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the inverter output topology mode reported by the SMG configuration block.
capabilities.note: Output mode according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Single
choices.description: Single inverter output mode.

choices.label: Parallel
choices.description: Parallel-capable output mode.

choices.label: 3 Phase-P1
choices.description: Three-phase mode, phase 1.

choices.label: 3 Phase-P2
choices.description: Three-phase mode, phase 2.

choices.label: 3 Phase-P3
choices.description: Three-phase mode, phase 3.

capabilities.title: Output Source Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes how the inverter prioritizes utility, PV, and battery when powering the load.
capabilities.note: Output source priority according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Utility-PV-Battery
choices.description: Prefer utility first, then PV, then battery.

choices.label: PV-Utility-Battery
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then utility, then battery.

choices.label: PV-Battery-Utility
choices.description: Prefer PV first, then battery, then utility.

recommendations.reason: Typical self-consumption preference for off-grid operation.

capabilities.title: Input Voltage Range
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the acceptable AC input voltage range used by the inverter.
capabilities.note: Input voltage range according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Wide Range
choices.description: Allow a wider AC input voltage tolerance.

choices.label: Narrow Range
choices.description: Restrict AC input to a narrower utility range.

capabilities.title: Buzzer Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Controls when the inverter buzzer is allowed to sound.
capabilities.note: Buzzer mode according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Mute
choices.description: Mute the buzzer in all situations.

choices.label: Source Change, Warning, Fault
choices.description: Sound on input source changes and on specific warnings or faults.

choices.label: Warning and Fault
choices.description: Sound only for specific warnings or faults.

choices.label: Fault Only
choices.description: Sound only when a fault occurs.

capabilities.title: LCD Backlight
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the LCD backlight stays on continuously or turns off automatically.
capabilities.note: LCD backlight behavior according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Timed Off
choices.description: Allow the LCD backlight to turn off automatically.

choices.label: Always On
choices.description: Keep the LCD backlight on continuously.

capabilities.title: LCD Auto Return
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the LCD returns to the home page automatically after one minute.
capabilities.note: LCD auto-return behavior according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not return to the home page automatically.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Return to the home page automatically after one minute.

capabilities.support_notes: Observed on the real Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP (reported generically as SMG 6200) to return Modbus exception_code:7 during write attempts.
capabilities.title: Power Saving
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether inverter power-saving mode is enabled.
capabilities.note: Power saving flag according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Disable inverter power-saving behavior.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Enable inverter power-saving behavior.

capabilities.title: Overload Restart
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may restart automatically after an overload event.
capabilities.note: Overload restart flag according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not restart automatically after overload.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Restart automatically after overload when conditions allow.

capabilities.title: Over Temperature Restart
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may restart automatically after an over-temperature event.
capabilities.note: Over-temperature restart flag according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not restart automatically after over-temperature.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Restart automatically after over-temperature when conditions allow.

capabilities.support_notes: Observed on the real Sandisolar SD-HYM-4862HWP (reported generically as SMG 6200) to return Modbus exception_code:7 during write attempts.
capabilities.title: Overload Bypass
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may bypass output during overload conditions.
capabilities.note: Overload bypass flag according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Do not switch to bypass automatically on overload.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Allow automatic bypass during overload conditions.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization
capabilities.change_summary: Enables or disables the battery equalization mode.
capabilities.note: Battery equalization enable flag according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Off
choices.description: Disable battery equalization.

choices.label: On
choices.description: Enable battery equalization.

capabilities.title: Turn On Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Controls whether the inverter may be turned on locally, remotely, or by both methods.
capabilities.note: Turn-on mode according to the extended SMG config register set.

choices.label: Local and Remote
choices.description: Allow the inverter to be turned on both locally and remotely.

choices.label: Local Only
choices.description: Restrict turn-on to the local front panel.

choices.label: Remote Only
choices.description: Restrict turn-on to remote control only.

capabilities.title: Remote Turn-On
capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote turn-on through the extended SMG remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 420 with value 1 to request remote turn-on.

capabilities.title: Remote Shutdown
capabilities.change_summary: Requests remote shutdown through the extended SMG remote control register.
capabilities.note: Write register 420 with value 0 to request remote shutdown.

capabilities.title: Output Rating Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the nominal output voltage target reported by the inverter.
capabilities.note: Output rating voltage in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Output Rating Frequency
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the nominal AC output frequency target.
capabilities.note: Output rating frequency in hundredths of Hz.

capabilities.title: Battery Bulk Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the target voltage used during the main battery charge stage.
capabilities.note: Battery bulk voltage in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Overvoltage Protection
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery overvoltage protection threshold.
capabilities.note: Battery overvoltage protection point in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Float Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maintenance voltage applied after bulk charging is complete.
capabilities.note: Battery float voltage in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Redischarge Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the threshold at which the inverter resumes battery discharge after charging.
capabilities.note: Battery redischarge voltage in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Under Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the low-battery protection threshold that can force source switching.
capabilities.note: Battery under-voltage threshold in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Under Voltage Off-Grid
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the low-battery protection threshold used in off-grid mode.
capabilities.note: Battery low-voltage protection point in off-grid mode, in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Charge Source Priority
capabilities.change_summary: Changes which sources are allowed to charge the battery.
capabilities.note: Charge source priority according to SMG config block.

choices.label: Utility Priority
choices.description: Prefer utility charging over PV charging.

choices.label: PV Priority
choices.description: Prefer PV charging when solar power is available.

choices.label: PV and Utility
choices.description: Allow both PV and utility charging.

choices.label: PV Only
choices.description: Restrict charging to PV only.

recommendations.reason: Recommended when solar is available and AC charging should stay disabled.

capabilities.title: Max Charge Current
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the overall battery charging current limit.
capabilities.note: Maximum charge current in tenths of amps.

capabilities.title: Max AC Charge Current
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the maximum charging current that may come from AC/utility.
capabilities.note: Maximum AC charge current in tenths of amps.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization Voltage
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the target battery equalization voltage.
capabilities.note: Battery equalization voltage in tenths of volts.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization Time
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the equalization charge duration.
capabilities.note: Battery equalization time in minutes.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization Timeout
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the timeout after which equalization exits automatically.
capabilities.note: Battery equalization timeout in minutes.

capabilities.title: Battery Equalization Interval
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the interval between equalization cycles.
capabilities.note: Battery equalization interval in days.

capabilities.title: Low DC Protection SOC in Grid Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold that triggers low-DC protection while grid mode is active.
capabilities.note: Reverse-engineered from live SMG app changes. Raw unsigned percent threshold.

capabilities.title: Return To Solar-Battery-Utility Threshold
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold that returns the inverter to Solar-Battery-Utility after low-DC protection.
capabilities.note: Reverse-engineered from live SMG app changes. Raw unsigned percent threshold.

capabilities.title: Low DC Cut-Off SOC
capabilities.change_summary: Changes the battery SOC threshold used for low-DC cut-off.
capabilities.note: Reverse-engineered from live SMG app changes. Raw unsigned percent threshold.

capabilities.title: Exit Fault Mode
capabilities.change_summary: Sends the inverter command that exits the fault state when supported by the current fault condition.
capabilities.note: Write register 426 with value 1 to request exit from fault mode.

presets.title: Off-Grid Self Consumption
presets.description: Prefer PV for the load, keep battery ahead of utility, and disable AC charging when solar power is available.

items.reason: Prefer PV first and battery second when powering the load.
Keep AC charging disabled and use PV only for charging.

presets.title: Hybrid PV With Grid Backup
presets.description: Prefer PV for both output and charging, while keeping utility ahead of battery as the backup source for the load.

items.reason: Use PV first, then utility, and keep battery as the last backup source.
Prefer PV charging while still allowing the system to use utility as needed.
